feed.title: Pediatric Musculoskeletal Imaging Lab
feed.subtitle: We use advanced and multimodal imaging to understand how growing bones develop, adapt, and stay healthy.

entry.title: Welcome to the lab
entry.content: We’re excited to launch the Pediatric Musculoskeletal Imaging Lab and begin building a research program focused on growing bones, advanced imaging, and meaningful trainee opportunities.
entry.summary: We’re excited to launch the Pediatric Musculoskeletal Imaging Lab and begin building a research program focused on growing bones, advanced imaging, and meaningful trainee opportunities.

entry.title: Research opportunities
entry.content: We welcome interest from graduate students, postdocs, and summer students with backgrounds in engineering, computer science, biological sciences, biomedical sciences, and biomechanics.
entry.summary: We welcome interest from graduate students, postdocs, and summer students with backgrounds in engineering, computer science, biological sciences, biomedical sciences, and biomechanics.

entry.title: Participate in research
entry.content: Families, patient partners, and community members can help shape the lab’s research by sharing perspectives on study questions, design, interpretation, and communication.
entry.summary: Families, patient partners, and community members can help shape the lab’s research by sharing perspectives on study questions, design, interpretation, and communication.
